notes_for_human_reviewer: HIRE-READY — all five disciplines. Writes and pins the IdP/MFA decision, explicitly reconciling the Toronto/Bangalore split — written_memory 5. Async-by-default, no reflexive meeting — meeting_judgment 5. Rotates the 2am off Toronto with a concrete fair pattern and names it openly ('Toronto's carried the 2am slot... that's not fair') — and connects it to their going quiet — timezone_fairness 5. Makes a genuine, non-transactional check-in with Arjun plus a discreet PM heads-up — human_layer 5. All five should land 4-5.
